item.title: XPS 15 9560
item.description: Dell XPS-9560 Installation issue Add the non-free firmware-iwlwifi_*_all.deb from https://cdimage.debian.org/cdimage/unofficial/non-free/firmware/ to the installation media /firmware ACPI issue There is currently a bug that means that some kernels (particularly newer ones) will detect the wrong ACPI revision. Add acpi_rev_override=5 to /etc/default/grub GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX="acpi_rev_override=5 quiet" Update grub update-grub Reference Name Link Debian XPS 15 9560 https://wiki.debian.org/InstallingDebianOn/Dell/Dell_XPS_15_9560
